# Player-Centric Analytics

## Q1 Total Points Leaders TOP 20

msg.data:
Player-Centric Analytics

Q1 Total Points Leaders TOP 20

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

USE nba_db;

SELECT fullName, team_name, games_played, total_pts, avg_pts, avg_ast, avg_reb
FROM nba_db.nba_player_season_summary
WHERE season = '2025-26' AND game_type = 'Regular Season' AND games_played >= 20
ORDER BY total_pts DESC
LIMIT 20;

## Q3 Regular Season vs Playoffs Differential

msg.data: Q3 Regular Season vs Playoffs Differential

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT
  a.fullName, a.team_name,
  a.avg_pts AS reg_pts, b.avg_pts AS playoff_pts,
  ROUND(b.avg_pts - a.avg_pts, 1) AS pts_diff,
  a.avg_min AS reg_min, b.avg_min AS playoff_min
FROM nba_db.nba_player_season_summary a
JOIN nba_db.nba_player_season_summary b ON a.fullName = b.fullName AND a.team_name = b.team_name
WHERE a.season = '2025-26' AND b.season = '2025-26'
  AND a.game_type = 'Regular Season' AND b.game_type = 'Playoffs'
  AND a.games_played >= 30 AND b.games_played >= 3
ORDER BY pts_diff DESC
LIMIT 15;

## Q4 MIP Year-over-Year Growth Tracker

msg.data: Q4 MIP Year-over-Year Growth Tracker

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT
  a.fullName, a.team_name AS team_2425, b.team_name AS team_2526,
  a.avg_pts AS pts_2425, b.avg_pts AS pts_2526,
  ROUND(b.avg_pts - a.avg_pts, 1) AS improvement
FROM nba_db.nba_player_season_summary a
JOIN nba_db.nba_player_season_summary b ON a.fullName = b.fullName
WHERE a.season = '2024-25' AND b.season = '2025-26'
  AND a.game_type = 'Regular Season' AND b.game_type = 'Regular Season'
  AND a.games_played >= 30 AND b.games_played >= 30
ORDER BY improvement DESC
LIMIT 15;

## Q9 The five best players of each team this season

msg.data: Q9 The five best players of each team this season

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT t.team_name, t.fullName, t.games_played, t.avg_pts, t.avg_ast, t.avg_reb, t.rnk
FROM (
  SELECT team_name, fullName, games_played, avg_pts, avg_ast, avg_reb,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY team_name ORDER BY avg_pts DESC) AS rnk
  FROM nba_player_season_summary
  WHERE season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}' 
    AND game_type = '${GameType=Regular Season,Regular Season|Playoffs}' 
    AND team_name = '${TeamName=Lakers}'
) t
WHERE t.rnk <= 5
ORDER BY t.team_name, t.rnk;

## Q10 Comparison of the top 4 scorers

msg.data: Q10 Comparison of the top 4 scorers

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

WITH top4_scorers AS (
  SELECT fullName, team_name,
         ROUND(SUM(pts), 0) AS total_pts,
         ROUND(SUM(fg3m) * 3, 0) AS total_fg3_pts,
         ROUND(SUM(ftm) * 1, 0) AS total_ft_pts,
         ROUND((SUM(fgm) - SUM(fg3m)) * 2, 0) AS total_fg2_pts
  FROM nba_players_all
  WHERE minutes_played > 0 
    AND season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}' 
    AND game_type = '${Stage=Regular Season,Regular Season|Playoffs}'
  GROUP BY fullName, team_name
)
SELECT 
  fullName, 
  team_name,
  total_pts,
  ROUND((total_fg2_pts / total_pts) * 100, 1) AS pct_2pt_score,
  ROUND((total_fg3_pts / total_pts) * 100, 1) AS pct_3pt_score,
  ROUND((total_ft_pts / total_pts) * 100, 1) AS pct_ft_score
FROM top4_scorers
ORDER BY total_pts DESC
LIMIT 4;

msg.data:
fullname	team_name	total_pts	pct_2pt_score	pct_3pt_score	pct_ft_score
Luka Doncic	Lakers	2143	41.0	35.6	23.5
Shai Gilgeous-Alexander	Thunder	2117	58.2	16.3	25.5
Jaylen Brown	Celtics	2038	58.5	20.6	20.9
Kevin Durant	Rockets	2026	52.3	27.5	20.1

# Team-Centric Analytics

## Q1 Home-Court Advantage Analysis

msg.data:
Team-Centric Analytics

Q1 Home-Court Advantage Analysis

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT location, ROUND(AVG(is_win) * 100, 1) AS win_percentage, ROUND(AVG(team_pts), 1) AS avg_pts
FROM nba_team_games_clean
WHERE season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}' AND game_type = 'Regular'
GROUP BY location;

msg.data:
location	win_percentage	avg_pts
Away	44.6	114.8
Home	55.4	116.5

paragraphs.text:
%md

## Q2 Team Offensive Rankings with FG Details

msg.data: Q2 Team Offensive Rankings with FG Details

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT 
    team, 
    team_name, 
    COUNT(*) AS games_played,
    ROUND(AVG(team_pts), 1) AS avg_pts_scored,
    ROUND(AVG(fgm), 1) AS avg_fg_made,
    ROUND(AVG(fg3m), 1) AS avg_3pm_made,
    ROUND(AVG(reb), 1) AS avg_rebounds,
    ROUND(AVG(ast), 1) AS avg_assists
FROM nba_team_games_clean
WHERE season = '2025-26' AND game_type = 'Regular'
GROUP BY team, team_name
ORDER BY avg_pts_scored DESC;

## Q3 Specific Team Head-to-Head Tracker

Can directly enter team abbreviations such as OKC, LAL, GS in the input box to test.

msg.data:
Q3 Specific Team Head-to-Head Tracker

Can directly enter team abbreviations such as OKC, LAL, GS in the input box to test.

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT opponent, COUNT(*) AS total_games, SUM(is_win) AS wins, ROUND(AVG(is_win) * 100, 1) AS win_rate
FROM nba_team_games_clean
WHERE team = '${TargetTeam=OKC}' AND season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}' AND game_type = 'Regular'
GROUP BY opponent 
ORDER BY win_rate DESC;

## Q5 Defensive and Net Margin Elite Tier Rankings

msg.data: Q5 Defensive and Net Margin Elite Tier Rankings

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT team_name, ROUND(AVG(plus_minus), 1) AS net_margin, ROUND(AVG(is_win) * 100, 1) AS win_rate
FROM nba_team_games_clean
WHERE season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}' AND game_type = 'Regular'
GROUP BY team, team_name 
ORDER BY net_margin DESC 
LIMIT 15;

msg.data:

Oklahoma City Thunder	11.1	78.0

paragraphs.text:
%md

## Q6 Maximum Team Single-Game Scoring Milestones

msg.data: Q6 Maximum Team Single-Game Scoring Milestones

paragraphs.text:
%jdbc(hive)

SELECT team_name, game_date, team_pts AS single_game_points, plus_minus AS differential, game_type
FROM nba_team_games_clean
WHERE season = '${Season=2025-26,2025-26|2024-25}'
ORDER BY single_game_points DESC
LIMIT 10;
